mapper.sql: id, whitelist_type, whitelist_value, description, enabled, priority, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_detection_whitelist WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY priority ASC
SELECT FROM sys_detection_whitelist ORDER BY whitelist_type ASC, priority ASC, create_time DESC
SELECT FROM sys_detection_whitelist WHERE whitelist_type = #{whitelistType} AND enabled = 1 ORDER BY priority ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_detection_whitelist SET whitelist_type = #{whitelistType}, whitelist_value = #{whitelistValue}, description = #{description}, enabled = #{enabled}, priority = #{priority}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
